name: M MEDLER Bag
description: Medler's Duffle bag is strong from inside with a fashionable outside! Made of nylon and the strolley pattern makes this bag stylish and easy to carry The corner guards of the bags support from falling or slipping. It helps in holding your belongings sturdily and avoids any damage to the bag while traveling. Along with the pull strings of the bag, below are the trolley wheels attached to drag your bag while traveling by any means of transport. Medler's duffle bag is designed to be sturdy and has long durability with being water-resistant.This is an ideal bag for those who are travel buffs and like to go rustic with their journey. Along with its stylish look, it is also waterproof which reduces every traveler's worry.

name: LED Writing Board
description: Introducing the Glowrite LED Writing Board with USB Stand/Base ✨, a versatile and innovative addition to any home or office space. This sleek and modern writing board comes with a convenient USB stand/base, featuring a twin color piano black finish 🎹, adding a touch of elegance to your workspace. Proudly made in India 🇮🇳, the Glowrite LED Writing Board showcases quality craftsmanship and attention to detail, ensuring long-lasting durability and reliability. Available in six variants, one of which allows customization, enabling you to add your name for a personalized touch ✍️. Whether you're jotting down notes, creating colorful artwork, or displaying important messages, the Glowrite LED Writing Board is the perfect tool for all your needs. Its vibrant LED lights, available in warm white color, illuminate your writing or artwork, ensuring maximum visibility and impact 💡. Acrylic board measuring 24 x 16 cm and 4mm thick (Best in Class) Illuminate your ideas and bring your messages to life with the Glowrite LED Writing Board. Order yours today and experience the convenience and versatility of this must-have productivity tool. 🚀.

name: Lymio Shirt for Men
description: Step up your everyday style with this premium-quality men’s shirt from J B Fashion, designed for comfort, durability, and elegance. Made in India with precision craftsmanship, this shirt features a modern slim-fit cut and lightweight fabric that keeps you comfortable all day long. Measuring 10 × 2 × 11 cm and weighing just 299 g, it’s easy to carry and maintain. The shirt’s classic khaki tone makes it versatile for both casual and semi-formal occasions. Each pack contains 1 shirt and is covered under the brand’s warranty and quality assurance. With a strong customer response, this product proudly ranks among the Top #372 in Clothing & Accessories on Amazon India.

name: TAGDO Men's Loose Fit
description: For a relaxed weekend look, pair those sneakers with casual pants and a loose-fitting shirt. Men's casual pants are typically designed for comfort and versatility in everyday settings. These pants are characterized by their relaxed fit, often featuring straight or tapered legs. They are usually made from lightweight and breathable fabrics such as cotton or blends, ensuring comfort throughout the day.

name: Lymio Hoodie
description: This premium unisex sweatshirt from J B Fashion combines comfort, style, and durability for everyday wear. Made in India with precision craftsmanship, it features a modern fit suitable for both men and women, ensuring a cozy and trendy look. With compact dimensions of 10 × 2 × 11 cm and a lightweight build of 399 g, it is easy to wear, pack, and maintain, making it perfect for daily use or travel. Manufactured and distributed by J B Fashion, Surat – 395004, this sweatshirt undergoes strict quality checks to ensure long-lasting color and fabric quality. Ranked #329 in Clothing & Accessories on Amazon India, it offers the perfect balance of warmth, versatility, and fashion appeal for all seasons.

name: Campus Men Sneakers
description: Max out your style quotient with The Campus OG-27 Men's Sneaker Shoes. Make your everyday outings extra happening with the coolest sneakers on your feet. Displaying sleek and modern looks, these sneakers are perfect for every affair. The PU material of the upper keeps your feet safe from splashes and dirt, while the Yoga Max insole keeps your stride bouncy and comfy! The Anti-Slip outsole design further enhances your grip, preventing accidental slips and keeping your feet ready for all the fun! Pairing striking shades of bottle green, black, and bright white, these sneakers elevate your outfits and turn heads effortlessly!
